NOTICE OF PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ADMITTED (C.C.P. SECTION 2033.280)POINTS AND AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION; ORDER (ERRONEOUSLY SET IN LAW AND MOTION)
Off Calendar May-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ADMITTED (C.C.P. SECTION 2033.280).

No opposition filed; motion granted. The facts articulated in Requests for Admission will be deemed admitted unless responses are served at or before the hearing.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at davididaho14@gmail.com

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
